error_signature: n8n not working in queue mode
title: n8n fails to operate in queue mode
symptom: n8n does not respond when set to queue mode, neither through local IP nor the configured domain. The setup works in normal mode but fails in queue mode.
not_this_if: n8n is running in normal mode
Redis or PostgreSQL is not connected
root_cause: The issue arises from incorrect environment variable configurations, particularly the N8N_HOST and N8N_EDITOR_BASE_URL settings, which need to be correctly set to ensure proper communication between the editor, webhook, and worker services in a queue setup.
fix_steps: Update the N8N_HOST environment variable to the correct local IP address or domain.
Ensure that the N8N_EDITOR_BASE_URL is set to the correct URL that matches the N8N_HOST.
Restart the n8n services to apply the changes.
agent_instruction: Correct the N8N_HOST and N8N_EDITOR_BASE_URL in your configuration and restart the services.
